metadata.description: Kelly's App-in-Skill business tools for daily operations.

plugins.name: mr-kelly-skills
plugins.description: Kelly's App-in-Skill business tools: email inbox-zero, money ledger, finance anomaly audit, personal CRM, unified chat inbox, inquiry-to-quote desk, ticket triage & dispatch, lesson-plan compliance, social media aggregation, Search Console SEO desk, user feedback roadmap, market intelligence radar, fleet ops monitoring, content repurposing, GitHub PR review, short-drama & music-video production, team standup board, cross-border e-commerce (product research, listing factory, ads desk), and multi-agent rule setup. Each bundles a local browser UI for human review and approval.
